# Release checklist

## Before tagging
- Update the changelog
- Verify version number in the app and docs
- Check Patreon / Discord / website links if impacted
- Confirm community-specific wording is still accurate

## Validation
- Launch the app locally
- Confirm the main UI loads
- Run one core workflow end to end
- Note any known issue clearly in the release

## Publishing
- Fill `release-template.en.md`
- Fill `release-template.fr.md`
- Post short Discord announcement
- Publish GitHub release

## After release
- Verify release assets and download links
- Share the release on Discord
- Share the release on LinkedIn / Patreon if relevant
